'''karusu''' is an [[Aelaki]] [[Nouns|noun]] meaning "[[Wikt:hiccupping|hiccupping]] (auto-generated)". It has inherent '''child''' gender.

== Overview ==
{| class="wikitable"
|-
! Root consonants
| k-r-s
|-
! Word class
| [[Noun]]
|-
! Gloss
| [[Wikt:hiccupping|hiccupping]] (auto-generated)
|-
! Inherent gender
| child
|-
! Citation form
| karusu
|}

== Inflected forms ==
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Gender.Number !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[child]].[[collective]] || [[word:kærisith|kærisith]] || [[word:kærisij|kærisij]] || [[word:kærisish|kærisish]] || [[word:kærisi|kærisi]]
|-
| [[child]].[[plural]] || [[word:karurusuth|karurusuth]] || [[word:karurusuj|karurusuj]] || [[word:karurusush|karurusush]] || [[word:karurusu|karurusu]]
|-
| [[child]].[[singular]] || [[word:karusuth|karusuth]] || [[word:karusuj|karusuj]] || [[word:karusush|karusush]] || [[word:karusu|karusu]]
|-
| [[child]].[[zero]] || [[word:karufsuth|karufsuth]] || [[word:karufsuj|karufsuj]] || [[word:karufsush|karufsush]] || [[word:karufsuf|karufsuf]]
|}

''16 forms generated.''

== Case paradigm ==
''Shown for child singular.''
{| class="wikitable"
! Case !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[Agent]] || [[word:karusuthu|karusuthu]] || [[word:karusuju|karusuju]] || [[word:karusushu|karusushu]] || [[word:karusuku|karusuku]]
|-
| [[Patient]] || [[word:karusuth|karusuth]] || [[word:karusuj|karusuj]] || [[word:karusush|karusush]] || [[word:karusu|karusu]]
|-
| [[Possessive]] || [[word:karusuthul|karusuthul]] || [[word:karusujul|karusujul]] || [[word:karusushul|karusushul]] || [[word:karusukul|karusukul]]
|-
| [[Instrumental]] || [[word:karusuthuthu|karusuthuthu]] || [[word:karusujuju|karusujuju]] || [[word:karusushushu|karusushushu]] || [[word:karusuku|karusuku]]
|-
| [[Dative]] || [[word:karusuthun|karusuthun]] || [[word:karusujun|karusujun]] || [[word:karusushun|karusushun]] || [[word:karusukun|karusukun]]
|-
| [[Speaker]] || [[word:karusuthuoro|karusuthuoro]] || [[word:karusujuoro|karusujuoro]] || [[word:karusushuoro|karusushuoro]] || [[word:karusukuoro|karusukuoro]]
|}

== See also ==
* [[Aelaki Lexicon]]

[[Category:Aelaki child nouns]]
[[Category:Aelaki vocabulary]]
[[Category:Aelaki lemmas]]
[[Category:Word pages]]
{{wordpage|1f1e26d}}
